name: Solartech International Holdings Limited
summary: Solartech International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in cables and wires, and copper rods in the People's Republic of China, the Americas, Europe, Hong Kong, and other Asian regions. It offers cables and wires primarily to the manufacturers of white goods appliances. The company is also involved in the manufacture and trade of plastic products; trading of frozen foods; property holding; provision of financing and management services; holding of mining rights; and trademark holding activities. Solartech International Holdings Limited is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
